scope: Tracked working tree and repository history reachable from the current branch; values are intentionally redacted.

files.notes: INITIAL contains 42 set-level rows across 2 dates and 14 exercises. When atlas_summary_reports is absent, the live application loads this dataset. It appears consistent with real training history rather than a clearly labelled synthetic fixture. Redacted example: Incline DB Press — [weight redacted] x [reps redacted].
Tracked public duplicate of the embedded INITIAL dataset. It is not referenced by the current index.html script load list, but remains publicly downloadable and is present in history.
Tracked public aggregate artifact containing the same embedded INITIAL dataset. Not referenced by the current runtime entry page.
Tracked public legacy artifact containing the same embedded INITIAL dataset. Not referenced by the current runtime entry page.

files.path: Git history: index.html, script.js, all_scripts.js, script_1.js
files.notes: The exposed set rows occur in many historical revisions (approximately 39 revisions across the four files). Removing current copies does not remove prior blobs from public Git history or forks. History remediation requires a separately approved incident-response decision.

A removed legacy file exists in several historical revisions and contains health/workout terminology. This audit did not classify any complete raw health payload in it; retain it in the history-remediation review scope.
Test-only values appear deliberately synthetic and are not loaded by index.html. Keep fixtures explicitly labelled synthetic.
Documentation example only; no complete personal record was confirmed.

notFoundInTrackedCurrentFiles: complete current raw Polar health payload

interpretation.publishableSupabaseKey: A browser publishable key is present as expected for a client application. Its visibility is not by itself a secret exposure.
interpretation.currentRuntimeStorage: Additional real data may exist only in browser localStorage or the live Supabase project; it is not inspectable from the repository alone.
interpretation.history: Current-branch deletion alone is insufficient to retract public historical blobs.
